item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p02","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant opens with an explicit brake, identifies this as the fourth repeated local reminder/overlay, distinguishes a one-time emergency note from a long-term baseline, and moves upstream to a unified pre-submit checklist or required validation. Although it still supplies a temporary reminder, it rejects continuing overlays as the default and proposes consolidation/structural redesign."}
